summary: Applied the interactive ops portal live on ops.lv3.org with the corrected 8092 host-port contract, synchronized the docker-runtime guest firewall and Proxmox VM firewall for VM 120, and updated the nginx edge proxy to the interactive runtime.

verification.observed: Both http://127.0.0.1:8092/health and http://10.10.10.20:8092/health returned HTTP 200 with {"status":"ok"} after the final ops portal converge.
A live probe from nginx-lv3 to http://10.10.10.20:8092/health returned HTTP 200 after synchronizing the guest nftables rules and the Proxmox VM firewall for VM 120.
https://ops.lv3.org/health returned HTTP 200 with the portal health payload, and https://ops.lv3.org/ returned HTTP 302 to the OIDC sign-in flow.

notes: The standard ops portal service apply now works from the repo after adding the missing playbook entrypoint, fixing the mutation-audit import path, adding bounded retries around docker compose up, and converging the runtime on host port 8092.
The live rollout also required updating stale firewall and edge state that still referenced the old 8090 publish path.

The repository-wide guest-network-policy converge remains blocked by an unrelated live drift where Proxmox no longer has VM 151, so VM 120's Proxmox firewall file was corrected directly during this rollout.
